arts.ttl: Sources: Tottenham are in the mix to sign defender who once left Carlo Ancelotti stunned
arts.sum: Carlo Ancelotti even managed the Tottenham target 👀

arts.ttl: Report: Crystal Palace now open talks to sign £16.6m player who Tottenham also want
Journalist names “the favourite” for Newcastle man – Explains developing transfer situation
arts.sum: Botafogo are likely to be ahead of Sao Paulo and Palmeiras in the developing race for Newcastle United’s Miguel Almiron. That’s according to journalist Jorge Nicola, who reports on the situation today and why he believes if the Paraguayan heads to Brazil it will be with Botafogo. Almiron has been continually linked with a move The post Journalist names “the favourite” for Newcastle man – Explains developing transfer situation appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Nine Newcastle United transfer decisions to make as three unsellable stars set to stay
arts.sum: “The days when teams don’t sell big players are gone,” said Howe in December. Fear not, Eddie Howe has consistently expressed his belief that he thinks the winter window won't be a particularly active one for the Magpies unless they shift players to subsequently free up funds and lessen the looming threat of profit and sustainability punishments.

arts.ttl: Ange Postecoglou may have already hinted why Tottenham are suffering so many injuries after having similar problem at Celtic
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur are suffering from an unprecedented injury crisis this season and the club’s supporters want answers. Ange Postecoglou will be without eight big-name players...

arts.ttl: Newcastle United pull off £130m masterstroke as Manchester United stunned - Ciaran Kelly
arts.sum: There are numerous factors behind Newcastle's upturn in results and performances - confidence being the main one - but Howe was the first to recognise how the players are playing in their 'best positions and look happy and comfortable in those positions' after Tonali, Joelinton and Bruno started five consecutive games together for the first time. Sandro Tonali, Bruno Guimaraes and Joelinton were so dominant in the middle of the park that Manchester United boss Ruben Amorim felt moved to throw on another midfielder, Kobbie Mainoo, in the 33rd minute.

arts.ttl: 'That good': Tottenham told star they let go in 2019 actually looked like the 'English Messi' as a youngster
Report: Newcastle have just been offered a chance to sign £82m Man United player in a shock deal this month
Anthony Gordon to Man City transfer reality clear amid Newcastle United's PSR battle
arts.sum: Despite speculation around his future, the Magpies would tie Gordon down to a new long-term contract in October having impressed following his £45million move from Everton back in January 2023. However, Newcastle are in a strong position when it comes to any future transfer negotiations for Gordon having fended off interest from Liverpool in the summer.

arts.ttl: Burnley's James Trafford transfer stance as Newcastle United's £20m interest remains
arts.sum: Eddie Howe is not keen on losing Dubravka this month but Trafford is a long-time target of the Toon boss and should Newcastle's stand-in No 1 depart before the winter window closes, the north east outfit are poised to again explore their interest in the £20m-rated stopper. Burnley are determined to fend off any interest for James Trafford until at least the summer as Newcastle United's interest in the goalkeeper lingers.
